pkgmetadata.longdescription: This package exposes two modules, 'Text.ParserCombinators.Parsec.IndentParser' and 'Text.ParserCombinators.Parsec.IndentToken', for constructing parser combinators for indentation based syntactic structures. The former exports the basic indentation parser combinators and the later together with 'Text.ParserCombinators.Parsec.Language' and 'Text.ParserCombinators.Parsec.Token' can be used to define tokenisers for programming languages.
